headline: Spire to Sell Gas Storage Assets for $650M to I Squared Capital
summary: SR to sell gas storage assets for $650M as it sharpens focus on regulated utilities and funds a key acquisition to drive steady growth.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Atmos Energy with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $195
